reason: Custom provider fallback behavior (baseUrl without customProvider falls back to OpenAI-compatible adapter) is undocumented. Consumers need to know this to use the feature correctly.
proposedChange: In the 'Provider Resolution / Custom Provider Fallback' section, add: when customProvider is absent but baseUrl is set, createProvider falls back to createOpenAIProvider(baseUrl, apiKey, model). Also update README.md with a usage example showing this pattern.
